title: AstraRise
description: A beautifully animated astronomy experience blending deep-space imagery, parallax motion, and subtle atmospheric UI. Built as an exploration of immersive visual storytelling.

title: PuzzleX
description: An experimental motion-driven interface blending puzzle interactions with expressive GSAP animation. Focused heavily on UX timing, easing, and playful movement.

title: Minimal Archive
description: A minimalistic archive interface built as a design study in dark mode form, spatial hierarchy, and ambient motion. Uses generative layout transitions.

title: The Last Ring
description: A story-driven atmospheric landing page with symbolic motion cues, soft lighting, and dramatic pacing. Designed to feel like the opening shot of a film.
